{{Quote|He died bravely.|Leia Organa Solo|<ref name="The New Jedi Order: Balance Point">''[[The New Jedi Order: Balance Point]]''</ref>}}
'''Randa Besadii Diori''' was a [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Spice/Legends|spice]] merchant who defected to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. During that time, his parent [[Borga Besadii Diori]] was pregnant with Randa's sibling while defending [[Nal Hutta/Legends|Nal Hutta]] with only half of the clan's support. Due to the invasion, Randa was small for his age.

==Biography==
====Aboard the ''Crèche''====
Randa was originally selected as a liaison for the Hutts and the Yuuzhan Vong in their slaving activities. He arrived to help oversee the slaves placed aboard the [[Crèche (clustership)|''Crèche'']], a [[clustership]]. [[Wurth Skidder]], a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]], attempted to convince the [[yammosk]] that Randa was planning to assassinate [[Chine-kal]], the [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] of the vessel, but the plan failed. When it was learned that the Hutts had betrayed the Yuuzhan Vong, Chine-kal slated Randa for execution, but [[Jedi Master/Legends|Master]] [[Kyp Durron]] and [[Ganner Rhysode]] managed to rescue Randa at Skidder's request, and he helped them destroy the yammosk.

====Trapped on Duro====
{{Quote|Betrayed you... it's...my nature...I'm...sorry...|Randa's last words, delivered with his final breaths to Leia Organa Solo|<ref name="The New Jedi Order: Balance Point" />}}
Unable to return to [[Nal Hutta/Legends|Nal Hutta]], Randa fled to [[Duro/Legends|Duro]], where the New Republic had established its [[Senate Select Committee for Refugees|SELCORE]] operations following the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Battle of Nal Hutta|conquest]] of his [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]]. He attempted to secure his own safety, and at one point unwittingly revealed himself again as a traitor to the Yuuzhan Vong when he informed the [[Senator/Legends|senator]] of [[Kuat/Legends|Kuat]], [[Viqi Shesh]], that there were Yuuzhan Vong spies operating in the biodomes. Shesh herself was a traitor and merely passed the information on to her superiors. When the Yuuzhan Vong [[Battle of Duro (Yuuzhan Vong War)|invaded]] Duro itself, Randa was one of the first to be captured alongside Administrator [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]]. During an attempt to reach the mining laser and kill himself along with several of the enemy, Randa was apprehended. He failed since Leia had coded the laser to her voiceprint.

Later, when [[Warmaster]] [[Tsavong Lah]] tried to sacrifice Leia to the Slayer God [[Yun-Yammka]], Randa lashed out at the Warmaster with his enormous tail, knocking out several guards. Unfortunately for Randa, Priestess [[Vaecta]] threw a [[tkun]] at the Hutt, which she used to strangle him. The Warmaster and [[Nom Anor]] then ordered their troops to take the body of Randa to the kitchens for studying.

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Randa_njos.jpg|thumb|Commissioned drawing of Randa by R. K. Post.]]

[[R. K. Post]] was commissioned to draw Randa for ''[[The New Jedi Order Sourcebook]]'', but the image was cut from the final version.
